indication: Abdominal discomfort, chronic kidney disease, evaluate for nephrolithiasis and bowel obstruction
technique: Single AP supine radiograph of the abdomen was obtained.

findings.bowelGasPattern: Nonobstructive bowel gas pattern. No dilated loops of small bowel. Normal distribution of colonic gas.
findings.calcifications: Atherosclerotic calcification of the abdominal aorta and bilateral iliac arteries. No radiopaque urinary tract calculi identified.
findings.kidneys: Renal outlines are poorly visualized on plain radiograph. No large renal calculi.
findings.osseous: Degenerative changes of the lumbar spine including disc space narrowing at L4-L5 and L5-S1. Mild osteophyte formation. No acute fracture.
findings.other: Surgical clips in the right upper quadrant consistent with prior cholecystectomy.

impression: No radiopaque urinary tract calculi identified.
Atherosclerotic calcification of the abdominal aorta and iliac arteries.
Degenerative changes of the lumbar spine.
comparison: No prior KUB available for comparison.
